args.code: (()=>{const issues=[];const empty=[];const nulls=[];const overflows=[];const lowContrast=[];const smallFonts=[];const allText=[];function walk(el,depth){if(depth>25)return;const tag=el.tagName;if(tag==='SCRIPT'||tag==='STYLE'||tag==='NOSCRIPT'||tag==='SVG')return;const rect=el.getBoundingClientRect?el.getBoundingClientRect():null;const text=(el.textContent||'').trim();const isLeaf=el.children.length===0;if(isLeaf&&text.length>0){allText.push({tag,text,class:el.className,id:el.id});const style=window.getComputedStyle(el);const fs=parseFloat(style.fontSize);if(fs<12&&rect&&rect.width>20&&rect.height>10)smallFonts.push({tag,text:text.substring(0,40),fontSize:fs,class:el.className});const hasTr=/[çğıöşüÇĞİÖŞÜ]/g.test(text);const hasEn=/[a-zA-Z]{4,}/g.test(text);if(hasTr&&hasEn&&text.length>5){issues.push({tag,text,class:el.className,reason:'tr+en mix'});}}if(isLeaf&&text.length===0&&rect&&rect.width>5&&rect.height>5&&['DIV','SPAN','P','H1','H2','H3','H4','H5','H6','TD','LI','SECTION','ARTICLE','HEADER','FOOTER','MAIN','ASIDE','NAV'].includes(tag)){const style=window.getComputedStyle(el);if(style.display!=='none'&&style.visibility!=='hidden'){empty.push({tag,class:el.className,id:el.id,width:Math.round(rect.width),height:Math.round(rect.height)});}}if(rect&&rect.width>0&&rect.height>0){if(el.scrollWidth>el.clientWidth+2){overflows.push({tag,class:el.className,id:el.id,reason:'horizontal',scrollW:el.scrollWidth,clientW:el.clientWidth,text:text.substring(0,60)});}if(el.scrollHeight>el.clientHeight+5&&tag!=='HTML'&&tag!=='BODY'){overflows.push({tag,class:el.className,id:el.id,reason:'vertical',scrollH:el.scrollHeight,clientH:el.clientHeight,text:text.substring(0,60)});}}const style=window.getComputedStyle(el);const color=style.color;const bg=style.backgroundColor;Array.from(el.children).forEach(c=>walk(c,depth+1));}walk(document.body,0);const nullTexts=allText.filter(t=>/[Nn]ull|[Uu]ndefined|NaN|\[object Object\]|placeholder|lorem ipsum|example|sample text|coming soon|TODO|FIXME|temp|not available|no data|empty|loading\.{0,3}$/i.test(t.text));return JSON.stringify({allTextCount:allText.length,langIssues:issues.slice(0,30),emptyElements:empty.slice(0,30),nullTexts:nullTexts.slice(0,30),overflows:overflows.slice(0,30),smallFonts:smallFonts.slice(0,30),url:location.href,title:document.title,viewportWidth:window.innerWidth,viewportHeight:window.innerHeight,scrollHeight:document.documentElement.scrollHeight,totalElements:document.querySelectorAll('*').length})})()
